leadText: Aroma Veil (Japanese: アロマベール Aroma Veil) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature Ability of Spritzee and Aromatisse.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Aroma Veil prevents the Pokémon with this Ability and its allies (including non-adjacent allies) from being afflicted by Taunt , Torment , Encore , Disable , Cursed Body , Heal Block and Psychic Noise , and infatuation . Despite being a move that also prevents the use of moves, Imprison is not affected by this Ability. Psychic Noise will only inflict damage; its secondary effect will not activate against Pokémon with this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Aroma Veil has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Aroma Veil prevents the Pokémon with this Ability and its allies (including non-adjacent allies) from being afflicted by Taunt , Torment , Encore , Disable , Cursed Body , Heal Block and Psychic Noise , and infatuation . Despite being a move that also prevents the use of moves, Imprison is not affected by this Ability. Psychic Noise will only inflict damage; its secondary effect will not activate against Pokémon with this Ability.
